title: Helmaroc King
description: This datapack adds Helmaroc King with custom mechanics from Zelda: The Wind Waker & Four Swords Adventures. No resource pack required
body:
# Helmaroc King

![Forsaken Fortress battle](https://i.imgur.com/sACQp5w.gif)
_Destroying the crown of the Helmaroc King with the mace, then hitting with a sword_


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Helmaroc King preview](https://i.imgur.com/kV87G4k.gif)

</details>



This datapack was made for mapmaking as Helmaroc King currently can't spawn naturally.

## Helmaroc King features
- Has 300 HP
- Will fly around you and hit you
- Once killed, its model will despawn aswell
- No resource pack required
- Has flying sound
- Has custom attacks
  - Can grab stone and grass blocks to throw them at the player
  - Can use his wings to make the player go backwards

### How to kill him
- Damage him first with the mace
  - Once he get hit 5 times with the mace, his crown will break, revealing a feather on its head
- You can then damage him with anything

### How to summon Helmaroc King (as an operator)

- Run /function helmaroc_king:summon
- Run /function helmaroc_king:kill to despawn every summoned Helmaroc King

## Performance impact
- For the server: low
- For the player: low
